programmes.show_description: Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep95
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep98
The Judge says anyone foolish enough to co-sign on a lease for a bunch of kids can't get one on their own! S23, Ep61
Two young boys are accused of bullying an allegedly unsupervised four-year-old and vandalising a car with a branch. S23, Ep62
The purchase of a Bengal cat by a beginner breeder ends with a fight over the pick of the litter and a cat's death. S23, Ep63
A newlywed says she had to purchase a last-minute wedding dress for $1,500 instead of $350 due to an allegedly shoddy fashion designer's work. S23, Ep64
A woman is admitted to hospital in 'deep shock' after allegedly witnessing her mother-in-law being attacked by their tax preparer's dogs. S23, Ep65
A woman sues her neighbour for the cost of a fence, harassment and damages for filing an allegedly false report with the health department. S23, Ep66
When cousins decide to go into business together, their first delivery attempt ends with threats from customers over damaged goods. S23, Ep67
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep90
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep92
The body of Jessica Knott is meticulously analysed and evidence reveals a startling truth about the killer. S7, Ep29
When a young woman vanishes, police suspect a man with a history of assault. But can they make a conviction? S7, Ep30
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A look at the case of teenager Alex Davies, who was murdered by Brian Healless after the pair met on the dating app Grindr. S1, Ep1
In April 2022, Katie Kenyon vanished from her home. A chilling investigation revealed her manipulative ex-boyfriend had trapped her in a cycle of fear. S1, Ep2
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
In 2019 in Hays, Kansas, Colby Trickle called 911 and said he woke up to his ears ringing and saw his wife, Kristen Trickle, bleeding next to him in the bed. S36, Ep28
The latest forensic technology is used to analyse a postcard that could incriminate a religious figure who took part in war crimes. S5, Ep13
When a hearing impaired 77-year-old on a road trip is attacked by a thief and shot to death, investigators are determined to bring the killer to justice. S16, Ep13
Investigators turn to forensic evidence, when CCTV footage of a convenience store murder proves too fuzzy to be of any use. S5, Ep14
A sex offender and murderer attacks in a terrifying rage. This predator evades capture for years, but leaves a critical piece of evidence - his palm print. S16, Ep14
In March 2011, Sian O'Callaghan vanished from a Swindon nightclub. This documentary details her last moments captured on CCTV and the grim discovery of her body. S1, Ep3
In 2017, Ellen Higginbottom was murdered by Mark Buckley in Orrell Water Park, Wigan. After fleeing the scene with her laptop and phone, Buckley was caught by police. S1, Ep4
In May of 2018, detective Brian Fanion dialled 911. When police arrived at the scene, they found 51-year-old Amy Fanion dead on the dining room floor. S36, Ep29
A gunman killed a worker at a manufacturing plant. He hoped to have covered his tracks, but forensics enabled police to track him down. S7, Ep33
Find out how police tracked down a killer using a computer, after receiving an anonymous letter about the deaths of several prostitutes. S7, Ep35
A woman recognised a detailed drawing of a serial rapist. Police closed in on the suspect and used forensic evidence to bring him down. S7, Ep36
When a family all develop signs of ill-health, the mother happens upon a toxic mould expert who could have the answer to their problems. S7, Ep37
A well-intended mother tries to crowd too many party items into her garden; when the carnival equipment is moved to the street, alleged damages occur. S23, Ep68
A woman says she was going through a hard time, so she borrowed money from a friend for 'beauty' treatments to cheer her up. S23, Ep69
A woman discovers that her wages are being garnished to satisfy her husband's child support payments to his ex-girlfriend. S23, Ep70
When a woman sues her ex-friend for excessive mileage on a leased car, the Judge explains why it was a very bad idea. S23, Ep71
A young woman sues her ex-business partner for damages resulting from the dissolution of their alleged partnership in a salon. S23, Ep72
A young woman vents to a family friend about her financial troubles after being involved in a hit and run; the friend takes action but expects to be paid back. S23, Ep73
A dog's eye fills with blood after a skirmish with a neighbour's cat; the neighbour denies that her allegedly gentle, loving cat was involved. S23, Ep74

In May of 2018, detective Brian Fanion dialled 911. When police arrived at the scene, they found 51-year-old Amy Fanion dead on the dining room floor. S36, Ep29
When a young woman goes missing, her lurid call girl image is revealed, and her clients are all suspects in her disappearance. S5, Ep15
A massive explosion claims the life of a California farmhand. Authorities think it is accidental, but analysis of debris from the blast shows it's a bomb. S16, Ep15
When a gym teacher was found shot to death, the police suspect his wife of foul play, and a videotape recorded by the victim reveals his strange marriage. S5, Ep16
When a beautiful college student is stabbed to death in her apartment, suspicion falls on her roommate; who was only slightly wounded in the attack. S16, Ep16
In this episode, we explore the tragic murder of 18-year-old Lily Sullivan in Pembroke, Wales. After a brief encounter with 31-year-old Lewis Haines, Lily's life was cut short. S1, Ep5
In this gripping episode, we explore the tragic story of Sarah Williams, whose obsession with former fireman Ian Johnston leads to the murder of his new partner, Sadie Hartley. S1, Ep6
Nicki Myers Bates was just seven years old in 2006 when her mother vanished and the man her mum lived with told police he watched her die. S36, Ep30
A respected physician is murdered and investigators must use the knowledge of cell phone mapping and wiretapping to catch the killer. S7, Ep38
The family of a dead man claimed he had gone out walking alone and never returned. S7, Ep39
When a woman is convicted of killing her own mother, a new theory from an expert witness could prove to be her saving grace. S7, Ep41
Police close in on the kidnapper of teenage girls who tells them where he dumps the bodies. Can they catch him before he strikes again? S7, Ep42
A mechanic makes the mistake of parking a client's car on the street instead of in his shop; he is sued for damages when the vehicle is stolen. S23, Ep75
A woman claims the father of her daughter illegally evicted her; he countersues for harassment. S23, Ep76
As police allegedly escort a son from his father's property, tensions escalate; the ailing father sues for emotional distress. S23, Ep77
When a dog damages doors, carpet and banisters, the pet's owners give him to an animal shelter; their landlord comes after them for repair costs. S23, Ep78
The Judge is baffled by a woman suing her stepfather for damages after she misses months of car payments; he claims she assaulted her mother. S23, Ep79
A woman maces the father of her children because she thinks he is kidnapping the kids; he wipes the pepper spray on her face in retaliation. S23, Ep80
No one believes a woman when she claims to have acted out of anger by throwing a lightweight ball at a car; video evidence comes into play. S23, Ep81
